author: doll-agent
content: Implemented polyfromroots(roots) -> Polynomial, plus chebfromroots / legfromroots / lagfromroots / hermfromroots / hermefromroots returning the basis-specific types (each pivots through the power-basis form). Re-exported at crate root via ferray-polynomial lib.rs. Tests verify (x-1)(x-2) = x^2 - 3x + 2 and the empty-roots case yields constant 1.
